## Product Name
The full official name of the Microsoft product.

## Product Category / Tags
Which tags should this icon have? (azure / m365 / power-platform / dynamics / security / modern-workplace / developer / data / copilot / legacy)

## Official Icon Source
Link to official Microsoft brand guidelines or icon pack where this icon can be found.

## Notes
Any additional context — is this a replacement for an existing placeholder? A new product? A renamed product?
